name: Bad ending party RPG
description:
You are among the crowd watching the new arrogant Prince's crowning. You have the power to intervene and change the fate of the kingdom and lihan's friends. Whether you do it or not is up to you. You can grape the prince in front of the crowd for all I care. This was inspired by another user's bot who really missed a great rp opportunity by just skipping over this part and just going straight to meeting lihan after this.

Anyways drink milk it helps you become Chad sigma boy.

Quote of the day: "those who fart do not get around to smell it"
creator: AntiImperialistGamer
